ab: Tjeljev, i tjumaq sun?
en: Tjeljev, are you home?

ab: ui izua, kirimu tjumaqu.
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: ui izua, kirimu tedepu.
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: Tjeljev, i tjumaq sun?
en: Tjeljev, are you home?

ab: neka i tjumaq ti Tjeljev! ti Sangkilj aken, anema su sikikim? ku sipatukuljan anga nu mantjez ti Tjeljev.
ch: B:Tjeljev不在家耶！我是Sangkilj，有什麼事找嗎？回來我會轉告Tjeljev。
en: Tjeljev is not at home. I am Sangkilj. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: timaima mun?
en: Who are you?

ab: vuvu, ti Sankilj aken kati Tjeljev, pay suqeljevi amen.
ch: B:奶奶，我是Sangkilj和Tjeljev，請給我們開門！
en: Grandma, we are Sankilj and Tjeljev, please open the door for us.

ab: kacumusu, ti Sankilj aken kati Tjeljev, pay suqeljevi amen.
ch: B:奶奶，我是Sangkilj和Tjeljev，請給我們開門！
en: Grandma, we are Sankilj and Tjeljev, please open the door for us.

ab: tima?
en: Who is it?

ab: ti Ripun aken, kemikim aken a semamaza tjay Giana.
en: I am Ripun, I am here for Giana.

ab: kacumusu, mangtjengtjez aken lja ljemilji tjanusun.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: vuvu, mangtjengtjez aken lja ljemilji tjanusun.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: cuacuay anga sun lja ika mangtjengtjez, pay singelit anga aken aravac tjanusun.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: Tjeljev, mangtjengtjez aken lja kipakim tjanusun tua kivangavang.
en: Tjeljev, I am here to play with you.

ab: kirimu tedepu, cuay anga aken a tjakaljavaljava tjnusun.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: kirimu tjumaqu, cuay anga aken a tjakaljavaljava tjnusun.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: tiaken a natemalem taicu a vurasi, pay kanu a pavavala.
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看！
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: aicu a vurasi qaljemeqem aravac.
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: kelju! aicu a vangalj tiaken a natemalem, pay kanu a pavavala.
ch: A:來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: aicu a vangalj qaljemeqem aravac.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: pay qiladju! aicu a ljapanay a sinikilaing tua qinatian tiaken a natemalem pay kanu a pavavala.
ch: A:請坐！這是我種的有機玉米吃看看！
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: wu! aicu a ljapanay qaljemeqem aravac.
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

ab: keman sun tua tjianes?
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: ika aken a makaya keman tua tjianes, nu keman aken tua cadaq padria.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: keman sun tua tinapi?
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: keman sun tua bisukitu?
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: ui, tjenglay aken aravac.
en: Sure, I like it very much.

ab: pay ku sisungicuan tua vangalj ta su kanen.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: maljimalji, aicu a vangalj puqetim aravac.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: pay ku sialapan sun tua zaljum ta su tekelen.
en: I will bring you some water.

ab: maljimalji
en: Thank you.

ab: suliavu a keman, liav aravac a ku kinsa djamay.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: wu! aicu salum saka sanguaq angata.
ch: B:嗚! 真的很香也好吃。
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: suliavu a keman, uza liav anan a imaza.
en: Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.

ab: numatazua ika anga aken lja masiaq!
en: I’ll make myself at home then.

ab: suliavu a keman, uza liav anan a imaza.
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: liav anga aravac a ku kinan, nekanga nu ku sivalan a keman.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
